channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] How to land a job at a frontier lab (on Pretraining)
item.description: [AINews] How to land a job at a frontier lab (on Pretraining)

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Systematic Optimization of Real-Time Diffusion Model Inference on Apple M3 Ultra
item.description: Researchers optimized diffusion models for Apple M3 Ultra, showing CUDA optimization strategies don't transfer, and achieved real-time img2img at 22.7 FPS.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mirror Descent-Type Algorithms for the Variational Inequality Problem with Functional Constraints
item.description: Mirror descent algorithms solve variational inequality problems with functional constraints and achieve optimal convergence rates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reducing Credit Assignment Variance via Counterfactual Reasoning Paths
item.description: Researchers introduce IBPO, a counterfactual credit assignment framework that improves reinforcement learning for LLM reasoning by converting sparse rewards into step-sensitive learning signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SignMuon: Communication-Efficient Distributed Muon Optimization
item.description: Sign-Muon is a 1-bit, matrix-aware distributed optimizer combining signSGD and Muon for communication-efficient neural network training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Actions Disappear: Adversarial Action Removal in Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Study shows learned action masking substantially degrades self-play RL agents across poker and non-poker domains more than random perturbations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Structural Threshold in Decision Capacity Governs Collapse in Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Self-play RL agents collapse under asymmetric perturbations unless they preserve at least one decision with positive reach.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Investigating Action Encodings in Recurrent Neural Networks in Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Study evaluates different methods for encoding actions in RNN state updates within reinforcement learning agents.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Forecasting Medium-Horizon Alzheimer's Disease Progression: Residual Gap-Aware Transformers for 24-Month CDR-SB Change from ADNI Clinical and Biomarker Histories
item.description: Researchers develop a transformer model combining mixed-effects statistics and residual learning to predict 24-month Alzheimer's disease progression from clinical and biomarker histories.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AdaGraph: A Graph-Native Clustering Algorithm That Overcomes the Curse of Dimensionality and Enables Scientific Discovery
item.description: AdaGraph is a graph-native clustering algorithm that replaces distance-based computation with topology-based computation to overcome the curse of dimensionality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Language Game: Talking to Non-Human Systems
item.description: Researchers develop a reinforcement learning game framework allowing non-human systems to communicate directly rather than through language model intermediaries.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Bi-Level Chaotic Fusion Based Graph Convolutional Network for Stock Market Prediction Interval
item.description: Spatio-temporal graph model with chaotic fusion provides prediction intervals for stock market forecasting instead of single-point estimates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Phase Transitions in Driven Informational Systems: A Two-Field Perspective on Learning Theory and Non-Equilibrium Chemistry
item.description: Framework unifies phase transitions in deep learning and prebiotic chemistry using two gradient fields, predicting universality class aligned with recent findings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Preference Instability in Reward Models: Detection and Mitigation via Sparse Autoencoders
item.description: Reward models in LLMs show preference instability under semantic-preserving input changes; Sparse Autoencoders enable detection and mitigation without retraining.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Orth-Dion: Eliminating Geometric Mismatch in Distributed Low-Rank Spectral Optimization
item.description: Orth-Dion corrects a geometric mismatch in low-rank spectral optimization by using QR orthogonalization instead of column normalization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DACA-GRPO: Denoising-Aware Credit Assignment for Reinforcement Learning in Diffusion Language Models
item.description: DACA-GRPO addresses temporal credit assignment and likelihood bias in reinforcement learning for diffusion language models using two new mechanisms.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LoopQ: Quantization for Recursive Transformers
item.description: LoopQ addresses quantization challenges in recursive Transformer models, improving accuracy by 68.8% and reducing perplexity by 87.7% under W4A4 quantization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Goal-Conditioned Supervised Learning for LLM Fine-Tuning
item.description: Researchers propose Goal-Conditioned Supervised Learning (GCSL), an offline fine-tuning method for LLMs that treats feedback signals as explicit goals to achieve through supervised learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PropGuard: Safeguarding LLM-MAS via Propagation-Aware Exploration and Remediation
item.description: PropGuard protects multi-agent LLM systems from malicious instruction propagation by tracing attack paths and remediating compromised states.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HPC-LLM: Practical Domain Adaptation and Retrieval-Augmented Generation for HPC Support
item.description: Researchers fine-tune Llama 3.1 8B with domain adaptation and retrieval-augmented generation for specialized high-performance computing support and troubleshooting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Flow-Direct: Feedback-Efficient and Reusable Guidance for Flow Models via Non-Parametric Guidance Field
item.description: Flow-Direct guides flow models using persistent, non-parametric guidance fields derived from reward feedback, improving feedback efficiency and reusability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometric Asymmetry in MoE Specialization: Functional Decorrelation and Representational Overlap
item.description: MoE experts exhibit functional decorrelation while maintaining representational overlap; routing sparsity shapes this geometric structure.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Nested Learning: Collaborative Training of Self-Referential Memories for Test-Time Adaptation
item.description: FedNL proposes nested optimization for federated learning to learn optimization rules that enable zero-shot test-time adaptation across Non-IID client data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PIMSM: Physics-Informed Multi-Scale Mamba for Stable Neural Representations under Distribution Shift
item.description: PIMSM anchors neural representations to physical timescales via Mamba architecture, improving robustness under distribution shift.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Augmenting Human Evaluation with LLM Judges: How Many Human Reviews Do You Need?
item.description: Study proposes two-stage design: LLM evaluation of all items plus human rating subsample, using statistical methods to determine optimal evaluation sample sizes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LEAF: A Living Benchmark for Event-Augmented Forecasting
item.description: LEAF is a living benchmark for evaluating LLMs on event-augmented forecasting tasks including probabilities, trends, and time series.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ProxyKV: Cross-Model Proxy Pruning for Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference
item.description: ProxyKV enables efficient long-context LLM inference by using lightweight proxy models to asynchronously prune KV cache, achieving up to 3.21× prefilling speedup while maintaining accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TailedTS: Benchmark Dataset for Heavy-Tailed Time Series Prediction and Periodicity Quantification
item.description: TailedTS is a benchmark dataset of Wikipedia page views for testing time series forecasting models on heavy-tailed, non-Gaussian data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Is Rank-1 Steering Cheap? Geometry, Granularity, and Budgeted Search
item.description: Activation steering efficiently controls LLMs via geometry-guided search for rank-1 interventions, reducing search cost by ~40% while concept granularity predicts remaining difficulty.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ORACLE: Anticipating Scams from Partial Trajectories in Streaming App Usage
item.description: Framework detects emerging smartphone scams from partial app-usage trajectories using agentic reasoning before explicit fraudulent intent.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Machine Learning-Based Pre-Test Risk Stratification for PCR-Confirmed Chlamydia Using Patient-Reported Data and Urine Biomarkers
item.description: Machine learning models combining patient-reported data and urine biomarkers improve robustness for Chlamydia infection pre-test risk stratification.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Scaling Laws of Skills in LLM Agent Systems
item.description: Researchers identify two coupled scaling laws governing skill library performance in LLM agents, enabling optimization improvements from 71% to 92% routing accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PQR: A Framework to Generate Diverse and Realistic User Queries that Elicit QA Agent Failures
item.description: PQR generates realistic, diverse user queries via iterative refinement, uncovering 23-78% more QA agent failures than prior methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Scaling Accessible Mathematics on arXiv: HTML Conversion and MathML 4
item.description: arXiv's HTML Papers project adds MathML 4 accessibility annotations, improves error-free rendering to 75%, and ports LaTeXML to Rust.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond Sentiment Classification: A Generative Framework for Emotion Intensity Evaluation in Text
item.description: Generative models fine-tuned for continuous emotion intensity scores (0-100) outperform discrete classification approaches for sentiment analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SKG-Eval: Stateful Evaluation of Multi-Turn Dialogue via Incremental Semantic Knowledge Graphs
item.description: SKG-Eval evaluates multi-turn dialogue using incremental Semantic Knowledge Graphs to detect long-range consistency issues across conversation turns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Scalable Tool for Measuring Manner and Result Verbs in Developmental Language Research
item.description: Researchers developed a computational tool using LLMs and RoBERTa to classify manner and result verbs, achieving 89.6% accuracy for developmental language research.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CHI-Bench: Can AI Agents Automate End-to-End, Long-Horizon, Policy-Rich Healthcare Workflows?
item.description: CHI-Bench benchmark shows AI agents struggle with long-horizon healthcare workflows, achieving only 28% task completion despite policy-rich simulations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Language Acquisition Device in Large Language Models
item.description: LAD-inspired pre-pretraining on MP-STRUCT formal language improves LLM data efficiency and robustness against implausible linguistic structures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Retrieval-Based Multi-Label Legal Annotation: Extensible, Data-Efficient and Hallucination-Free
item.description: Retrieval-based legal annotation using k-nearest neighbors in embedding space reduces compute 20-30x versus fine-tuning and eliminates LLM hallucination.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Exploring Lightweight Large Language Models for Court View Generation
item.description: Researchers evaluate lightweight language models for generating court views from case facts and predicting criminal charges.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AgentKernelArena: Generalization-Aware Benchmarking of GPU Kernel Optimization Agents
item.description: AgentKernelArena benchmark evaluates AI coding agents on GPU kernel optimization across HIP, Triton, and PyTorch, achieving up to 6.89x speedups.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Constrained Code Generation with Discrete Diffusion
item.description: Constrained Diffusion for Code integrates constraint satisfaction into discrete diffusion models to improve code generation for functional correctness, security, and syntax.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CompactAttention: Accelerating Chunked Prefill with Block-Union KV Selection
item.description: CompactAttention improves chunked-prefill attention efficiency using Block-Union KV Selection for long-context language models with minimal accuracy loss.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RTI-Bench: A Structured Dataset for Indian Right-to-Information Decision Analysis
item.description: RTI-Bench is a structured dataset of 1,516 Indian CIC decisions for predicting appeal outcomes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MixSD: Mixed Contextual Self-Distillation for Knowledge Injection
item.description: MixSD improves language model knowledge injection by mixing tokens from expert and naive conditionals to preserve base capabilities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PaliBench: A Multi-Reference Blueprint for Classical Language Translation Benchmarks
item.description: PaliBench is a multi-reference translation benchmark for Pali-English classical texts with a reusable methodology for evaluating classical language translations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] E-PMQ: Expert-Guided Post-Merge Quantization with Merged-Weight Anchoring
item.description: E-PMQ improves post-merge quantization using expert-guided calibration and weight anchoring to address conflicting deviations in merged expert models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] JSPG: Dynamic Dictionary Filtering via Joint Semantic-Pinyin-Glyph Retrieval for Chinese Contextual ASR
item.description: JSPG framework improves Chinese contextual ASR by combining semantic, pinyin, and glyph features for keyword filtering.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Full Attention Strikes Back: Transferring Full Attention into Sparse within Hundred Training Steps
item.description: Full-attention LLMs are intrinsically sparse; RTPurbo exploits this for 9.36x prefill and 2.01x decode speedup with near-lossless accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Effort as Ceiling, Not Dial: Reasoning Budget Does Not Modulate Cognitive Cost Alignment Between Humans and Large Reasoning Models
item.description: Large reasoning models' token allocation aligns with human cognitive effort at training time, remaining unchanged by inference-time reasoning budget adjustments.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Roll Out and Roll Back: Diffusion LLMs are Their Own Efficiency Teachers
item.description: WINO enables revokable parallel decoding in diffusion LLMs; WINO+ further improves accuracy and efficiency by training on reliable token orderings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Closing the Gap at CRAC 2026: Two-Stage Adaptation for LLM-Based Multilingual Coreference Resolution
item.description: Gemma-3-27b with two-stage adaptation ranked first in CRAC 2026's LLM track for multilingual coreference resolution with 74.32 F1.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Skills on the Fly: Test-Time Adaptive Skill Synthesis for LLM Agents
item.description: SkillTTA enables LLM agents to adapt at test time by synthesizing task-specific skills from retrieved training trajectories, improving benchmark performance without parameter updates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Response-free item difficulty modelling for multiple-choice items with fine-tuned transformers: Component-wise representation and multi-task learning
item.description: Fine-tuned transformers predict multiple-choice item difficulty from text without response data; multi-task learning works best with limited training data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluation Drift in LLM Personality Induction: Are We Moving the Goalpost?
item.description: Fine-tuning reduces personality response variance in LLMs but cannot accurately express multi-dimensional Big Five profiles.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] HalluScore: Large Language Model Hallucination Question Answering Benchmark
item.description: HalluScore is an Arabic QA benchmark with 827 curated questions for evaluating LLM hallucinations across reasoning levels and domains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PARALLAX: Separating Genuine Hallucination Detection from Benchmark Construction Artifacts
item.description: Hallucination detection benchmarks contain construction artifacts inflating reported performance; most detection methods perform near chance when artifacts are removed.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Agentic AI Translate: An Agentic Translator Prototype for Translation as Communication Design
item.description: Agentic AI Translate proposes a four-stage agentic translation framework treating translation as communication design, using skopos theory and GEMBA-MQM error protocols for verification.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can LLMs Think Like Consumers? Benchmarking Crowd-Level Reaction Reconstruction with ConsumerSimBench
item.description: ConsumerSimBench evaluates whether LLMs can predict consumer reactions, finding the strongest model covers only 48% of real reaction patterns.
